problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
mechanism: Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient
hypothesis: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Forward. Forward osmosis using draw solution gradient directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
